emails.subject: Re: CNG Sabine Hub Services
emails.body: Re: CNG Sabine Hub Services Actually, the service is called "Parkfolio" by the hub. Sylvia just needs to verify that this is a point based service like the IHT service to finish. If you could call sylvia ASAP and all will be finished by today. RP Richard Pinion 12/20/99 04:31 PM
